name: Thyrocare Technologies Limited
summary: Thyrocare Technologies Limited provides diagnostic testing services to patients, laboratories, and hospitals in India. The company operates through Diagnostic Testing Services, Imaging Services, and Others segments. It conducts medical diagnostic tests and profiles of tests that focuses on early detection and management of disorders and diseases, including thyroid, growth, metabolism, auto-immunity, diabetes, anaemia, cardiovascular, infertility, and various infectious diseases. Its profiles of tests include 54 profiles of tests administered under its Aarogyam brand, which offers patients a suite of wellness and preventive health care tests. The company sells glucometer and glucostrips under the brand name Sugarscan; and radio-pharmaceutical. Thyrocare Technologies Limited was founded in 1996 and is based in Navi Mumbai, India.
